name: Dell Asset Recovery Services: Remove, Recycle, or Resell — An Executive White Paper
description: Aberdeen executive white paper (underwritten by Dell) examining the business, data-security, and environmental case for proactive IT-asset disposition. Models total reclamation cost at $115-$387 per device and evaluates Dell's Asset Recovery Services ($49-$69/system) as a compelling alternative. Recommends treating disposal as an up-front TCO element rather than a sunk cost.
